text.title: Financial Planning Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: ≥1 month revenue history AND burn computable AND monthly cadence committed?

branch.when: revenue_history_months >= 1 AND burn_computable == true AND monthly_cadence == true
